name: Low Calorie Irish Trifle Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 package (3.4 oz) instant French vanilla pudding mix
1 1/2 cups cubed fat-free golden pound cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine milk and pudding; beat until well blended. Let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, divide cake cubes evenly among 4 dessert cups (8 oz each).
3. Divide half of the raspberries evenly among the dessert cups. Spoon pudding over the raspberries. Top with remaining berries.
4. Spoon 2 tablespoons cool whip over each trifle cup. Refrigerate.
